news.title: AstraGrid Welcomes New Team Members
news.brief: Our team has grown with new specialists across engineering and operations. This expansion helps us support client projects with more speed and depth.

news.title: AstraGrid Opens New Regional Hub
news.brief: After steady growth over the years, we now serve new markets with a regional hub designed to improve local support and faster deployment cycles.
